_publications._publicationTitle: Spatial Gene-Expression Profiling Unveils Immuno-oncogenic Programs of NF1-Associated Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor Progression.

_contextSnippet: siRNA-mediated depletion of CENPF or BIRC5 impaired viability of human MPNST cell lines
details: Significant reduction in cell viability with BIRC5 inhibitors YM155 and LQZ-7I, and siRNA-mediated depletion of CENPF or BIRC5 impaired viability
